title: The Law Thief
tagline: A static page watches a swinging mass, steals its differential equation, and predicts the next swing exactly.
holy_shit: It doesn't estimate a trend — it discovers the governing ODE itself, prints it, and the real swing lands on the predicted line.
powered_by: CPython in the browser (Pyodide + numpy + scipy) running sparse system identification (SINDy) and solve_ivp with no backend
agent_scenario: When you need to recover a compact dynamical law from noisy motion data directly on-device, then forecast future trajectories live.
author: kody-w + Copilot
